source: A Note on the Inception Score.pdf

concepts.finding: The Inception Score (IS) measures GAN quality by combining per-sample class confidence with overall class distribution diversity.
concepts.implication: Good generative models balance per-sample confidence with overall diversity. Similarly, good search systems return individually relevant results that collectively cover diverse user intents.
concepts.open_question: Can the Inception Score concept (per-item quality + overall diversity) be adapted as a search result quality metric?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A search metric combining per-item relevance with result set diversity will better correlate with user satisfaction than relevance-only metrics.
